title: Github Copilot configuration fails for neovim
author: Tauseef Razaq
text:
Github copilot configuration in neovim fails.
I tried to use Github copilot in neovim on windows using this documentation. After cloning repo, I wrote :Copilot setup in neovim but I got the following error
Not an editor command: Copilot setup
How to fix this
